agent_identity.runtime_mi_note: Initially reuses pulser-dev MI with distinct SP scoping. Spawn dedicated MI id-ipai-agent-pulser-research-dev when runtime separation is justified by workload or cost attribution.

catalog_metadata.description: Read-only research agent for cited retrieval over internal IPAI corpus (PrismaLab, BIR rulings, Odoo docs) + web grounding via Bing Search.
differentiators: Citation discipline — every factual claim cites source (AI Search result, Bing result, or user-provided doc)
Internal-corpus-first — prefers IPAI indexes over web when both answer

tool_surface: azure_ai_search (srch-ipai-dev-sea, indexes: pulser-prismalab, pulser-bir-rulings, pulser-odoo-docs, pulser-runbooks)
github_mcp (conditional — when repo-context grounding explicitly required)

corpus_sources: PrismaLab systematic review corpus (indexed in pulser-prismalab)
BIR Revenue Regulations + RMCs + ATC catalog (pulser-bir-rulings)

ipai_tenant: SELECT on ipai_dev.gold (read-only; for any structured data grounding)

forbidden_actions: Any write operation to any system
Calling PG MCP (route read requests to pulser-finance)
Fabricating citations (must say 'UNKNOWN — not found in indexed corpus' instead)
closes_packs: Supports PrismaLab customers + Research use cases
